description: make Wiki, What is Codex and how to use it with document('https://openai.com/codex') and make wiki for codex 101 — Codex 101 began in February 2026 as a fact-based Korean developer resource and grew into a bilingual Korean and English tutorial site for developers who want a practical introduction to Codex. It brings setup, authentication, approval modes, slash commands, AGENTS.md, config, MCP, automation patterns, and workflow guidance into one structured guide.

codex-overview-slice.name: Codex Overview Wiki
codex-overview-slice.description: Create a wiki page explaining what Codex is, sourced from the official OpenAI Codex documentation at https://openai.com/codex.

codex-101-slice.name: Codex 101 Tutorial Wiki
codex-101-slice.description: Create a bilingual (Korean and English) developer tutorial covering Codex setup, authentication, approval modes, slash commands, AGENTS.md, config, MCP, automation patterns, and workflow guidance.
